Changed_Other.purpose: Facilitates easier tracking of changes and updates in the game's codebase.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Allows dynamic strings to include timestamps for real-time updates.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances communication by showing up-to-date information in chat or notifications.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a fast string representation of the Git hash for versioning.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance by speeding up version checks.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are formatted and displayed in strings for faster processing.
Changed_Other.purpose: Increases performance for players by ensuring that time-related information loads quickly.
